title: 2 Meter Tall Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: 2 Meter Tall Evangelion             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Feb 20, 2007 12:09 pm http://ga.sbcr.jp/news/0702/078/index.html That sucker is huge! I want one. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 20, 2007 1:18 pm that looks awesome

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 20, 2007 1:23 pm It probably costs as much as a sports car, so ask yourself, do I want the Eva or a Corvette?

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Tue Feb 20, 2007 5:46 pm Well, finding parking for an Eva would be a bitch ... but I don't really want a Corvette either...

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Feb 21, 2007 1:58 am Evas don't find parking, they make parking. Of course, they'd go down as the worst electric cars in history, considering their ~5 minute battery life.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama2006 » Wed Feb 21, 2007 7:17 am One word in the texts in Japanese read "秋葉原ホームページ", (Akihabara) wish I had the chance to go there myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Feb 21, 2007 9:48 pm I love to take a bat to that damn things head for all the mental damage it caused me.....

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Wed Feb 21, 2007 10:50 pm The clavicular plate is colored wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 22, 2007 12:24 pm They need Reichu and various other fan artists to design these freaking things! :x

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Feb 23, 2007 9:50 pm wow...uh...is that in akihabara because i think i've been to that store and seen that eva edit: didn't see the post that said akihabara. i have seen that thing in person.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 23, 2007 10:01 pm For all of the lonely otaku out there, this 2-meter-tall Evangelion figure incorporates secret features sure to satisfy unspeakable bio-mecha fetishes. However, we'll leave these sorts of salacious details as a surprise for those who have the audacity to purchase such a ridiculous piece of merchandise.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Feb 23, 2007 10:04 pm Reichu wrote: For all of the lonely otaku out there, this 2-meter-tall Evangelion figure incorporates secret features sure to satisfy unspeakable bio-mecha fetishes. However, we'll leave these sorts of salacious details as a surprise for those who have the audacity to purchase such a ridiculous piece of merchandise.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 23, 2007 10:12 pm Ornette wrote: You mean.... IT DISPENSES WHISKEY?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 24, 2007 3:46 am Ornette wrote: You mean.... IT DISPENSES WHISKEY?
